subcategory : "Email Domain"

# ovh_email_domain_account (Data Source)

Get the properties of an email account for a given domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ovh_email_domain_account" "account" {
  domain       = "example.com"
  account_name = "myaccount"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_name` (String) Name of the email account
- `domain` (String) Name of the email domain

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Account description
- `email` (String) Email address
- `is_blocked` (Boolean) If true, the account is blocked
- `size` (Number) Size of the account in bytes
